positive: A stylized, abstract minimalist mountain range silhouette under a dramatic, glowing sunset sky. The mountain range should be comprised of clean, stacked geometric shapes, creating a powerful, symmetrical central focus. The sunset colors should feature deep indigo, burnt orange, soft peach, and vibrant lavender gradient washes. Use strong edge lighting and high contrast to make the silhouettes pop. The overall mood is majestic, optimistic, and serene. Designed for apparel printing, utilizing clean lines and limited, bold color blocks. Vector art aesthetic, suitable for screen printing, high detail, 8k, centered composition.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, words, artifacts, bad anatomy, noisy, amateur drawing, cartoon, jpeg artifacts, grain, bokeh, cropped, low resolution
